d: Tasi summons a dream that lasts for [[3.5]]s, hypnotizing all enemies. Hypnotized enemies cannot move or act and take [[70%]]<ATK> damage per second.
Increases damage per second to [[80%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage per second to [[90%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage per second to [[100%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage per second to [[110%]]<ATK>.

Tasi consumes [[10%]] of her current HP to deal damage equal to [[110%]] of her consumed HP to adjacent enemies, stunning them for [[0.5]]s. The damage dealt will be no less than [[60%]]<ATK>. She then flies to the farthest enemy and applies the same effect to adjacent enemies. However, the second hit on the same enemy will only deal [[50%]] of the original damage.
Increases damage to [[120%]] of her consumed HP.
Increases damage to [[130%]] of her consumed HP.
Increases damage to [[140%]] of her consumed HP.

Tasi enters her dream realm and transforms into a butterfly upon losing [[50%]]<HP> HP. In this form, she becomes [[invincible]], recovering [[120%]]<ATK> HP per second while dealing [[45%]]<ATK> damage to adjacent enemies. This effect lasts for [[3]]s, and Tasi can cast this skill up to [[2]] times in one battle.
Increases damage per second to [[50%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage per second to [[55%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage per second to [[60%]]<ATK>.
Tasi increases her ATK by [[9%]] during battle. After casting Eternal Dreamscape, she gains an extra [[6%]] ATK while the dream lasts.
Tasi increases her ATK by [[12%]] during battle. After casting Eternal Dreamscape, she gains an extra [[8%]] ATK while the dream lasts.
Tasi increases her ATK by [[15%]] during battle. After casting Eternal Dreamscape, she gains an extra [[10%]] ATK while the dream lasts.

Tasi gains [[70]] Haste and reduces damage taken by [[90%]] for [[5]]s after casting Eternal Dreamscape. During this time, Dream Dance no longer costs Tasi's HP to cast and has no cooldown. Its damage counts as if Tasi had consumed [[10%]] of her current HP, and she will prioritize targeting the farthest hypnotized enemy.
Gains [[100]] Haste after casting Eternal Dreamscape.
Adds [[40]] extra Penetration when dealing damage to hypnotized enemies with Dream Dance.
Gains [[130]] Haste after casting Eternal Dreamscape.
Tasi gains an extra attempt to cast Fluttering Dream each time she [[assists or defeats]] a non-summoned enemy.
